docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-14-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-14-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SHIRLEY P. LEIVA IS PRESENT.
